channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: SQL Vigil - Thu Jun 11 11:41:01 UTC 2026
item.description:
SQL Vigil is an IntelliJ IDEA inspection suite that catches risky SQL before it ships — it flags missing indexes, lock and concurrency hazards, dangerous DDL diffs...
vendor: fangyajun downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.sqlvigil.plugin

item.title: KetraTerm - Tue Jun 30 19:41:14 UTC 2026

item.title: AI Inline Review - Tue Jun 30 16:14:54 UTC 2026

item.title: JIMDB - Tue Jun 30 16:00:27 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.description:
